Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Erg6/SMT family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Erg6/SMT family. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU01022}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=squalene + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 3,22-dimethyl-1,2,23,24-tetradehydro-2,3,22,23-tetrahydrosqualene + 2 S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + 2 H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:34643, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:15440, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:70861; EC=2.1.1.262; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:22241476};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Converts squalene to mono- and dimethyl derivatives, but not to tri- and tetramethylated products. Unable to methylate cycloartenol, zymosterol or lanosterol. Methylates both C-3 and C22 positions, but only C-3 position in monomethylated products. Produces mainly dimethylated squalene. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:22241476}.
